originalTitle: Final Fantasy VII’s remake trilogy will conclude with Revelation
summary: Square Enix has officially announced the third and final game in its Final Fantasy VII remake trilogy: Final Fantasy VII Revelation. It will release on multiple platforms simultaneously - PC, PS5, Xbox Series X / S, and Nintendo Switch 2 - in spring 2027. In footage shown onstage at Summer Game Fest Live, there was […]
content: Square Enix has officially announced the third and final game in its Final Fantasy VII remake trilogy: Final Fantasy VII Revelation. It will release on multiple platforms simultaneously — PC, PS5, Xbox Series X / S, and Nintendo Switch 2 — in spring 2027. In footage shown onstage at Summer Game Fest Live, there was a lot to take in: You’ll get to fly the Highwind airship, jump off it to land in the game’s open world, play as Vincent Valentine and Cid Highwind in battle (who weren’t playable in Rebirth), challenge the gigantic Weapons, and visit places from the original game, like Wutai. You’ll also get to dress up your characters with armors that have special movesets, in what’s actually called the “FITS” system (“Function Integrated Tactical Suitwear”) — it’s intended to be like a jobs system from classic Final Fantasy games. In one trailer, you can get a closer look at things like the game’s world, which Vincent Valentine voice actor Matt Mercer says is “our most expansive open world yet” and one where you can “pick a direction and set sail.” It sounds as if you’ll have the agency to basically go wherever you want: “Where will the winds guide you first? That freedom is in your hands.” [Media: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uVMg1Ub-6-Y] And here is Square Enix’s official description of the game, from the trailer at the top of this post: > As the world teeters on the brink of annihilation, the final battle against Sephiroth begins. A meteor mars the sky, monstrous planetary guardians wreak havoc across the globe, and the fires of war rage. Now, Cloud and his companions must stand against this chaos to not only decide the planet’s fate, but bring a legendary conflict to its conclusion. > In the final chapter of the FINAL FANTASY VII remake project, the scale has never been larger and the stakes have never been higher. Take to the skies and explore a boundless world, fight alongside a fully assembled party, master strategic and dynamic combat, and prepare yourself for the climactic finale. > A vast planet awaits. Everything leads here. Revelation will conclude a yearslong saga that, so far, has actually turned out pretty well. Final Fantasy VII Remake was a thrilling, thoughtful take on the original that focused on the Midgar portion of the FFVII story. Four years later, Final Fantasy VII Rebirth let Cloud Strife and friends explore a big open world and also added the excellent Queen’s Blood in-game card game. (If you have save data from the upgraded Remake Intergrade or Rebirth, you’ll get bonus summon Materia in Revelation, according to Square Enix.) Oh, and one detail that fans of the remake trilogy may or may not be happy about for the third game in the series: Chadley, the strange, humanlike cyborg, will be back.
chineseTitle: 《最终幻想 VII》重制三部曲将以《启示录》结束
chineseSummary: Square Enix 正式宣布了《最终幻想 VII 重制三部曲》中的第三款也是最后一款游戏：《最终幻想 VII 启示录》。它将于 2027 年春季在多个平台上同时发布 - PC、PS5、Xbox Series X / S 和 Nintendo Switch 2。在夏季游戏节现场的舞台上显示的镜头中，有 [...]
chineseContent: Square Enix 正式宣布了《最终幻想 VII 重制三部曲》中的第三款也是最后一款游戏：《最终幻想 VII 启示录》。该游戏将于 2027 年春季在多个平台上同时发布 - PC、PS5、Xbox Series X / S 和 Nintendo Switch 2。在 Summer Game Fest Live 舞台上播放的镜头中，有很多值得一看的内容：你将驾驶 Highwind 飞艇，跳下它降落在游戏的开放世界中，在战斗中扮演 Vincent Valentine 和 Cid Highwind（他们在《重生》中无法玩），挑战巨大的武器，并参观原作中的地点游戏，比如五台。你还可以用具有特殊动作的盔甲来装扮你的角色，这实际上被称为“FITS”系统（“功能集成战术套装”）——它的目的就像经典《最终幻想》游戏中的工作系统一样。在预告片中，您可以仔细观察游戏世界等内容，文森特·瓦伦丁配音演员马特·默瑟（Matt Mercer）表示，这是“我们迄今为止最广阔的开放世界”，您可以在其中“选择一个方向并扬帆起航”。听起来好像你基本上可以去任何你想去的地方：“风会首先引导你去哪里？自由就在你手中。” [媒体：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uVMg1Ub-6-Y] 以下是史克威尔艾尼克斯对游戏的官方描述，来自本文顶部的预告片： > 当世界在毁灭的边缘摇摇欲坠时，与萨菲罗斯的最终战斗开始了。一颗流星毁坏了天空，可怕的行星守护者在全球范围内造成了严重破坏，战火肆虐。现在，克劳德和他的同伴必须对抗这场混乱，不仅决定地球的命运，还要结束一场传奇的冲突。 > 《最终幻想 VII》重制计划的最终章，其规模是前所未有的
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
